zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam De Melun II於1172年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫時，他的父親Louis De Melun I20歲，母親Gisèle De Cambrai16歲。他與Aremburge d'Halluin結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年9月29日在英國享年45歲。

zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam De Melun II于1172年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫时，他的父亲Louis De Melun I20岁，母亲Gisèle De Cambrai16岁。他与Aremburge d'Halluin结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年9月29日在英国享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam De Melun II was born in 1172, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Louis De Melun I, was 20 and his mother, Gisèle De Cambrai, was 16. He married Aremburge d'Halluin. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1217, in England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam De Melun II est né en 1172, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Louis De Melun I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gisèle De Cambrai, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Aremburge d'Halluin. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1217, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam De Melun II 1172 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis De Melun I 20 und seine Mutter Gisèle De Cambrai 16. Er hat Aremburge d'Halluin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. September 1217 im Alter von 45 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun II è nato il nel 1172 nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Louis De Melun I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle De Cambrai, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Aremburge d'Halluin. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 settembre 1217, nel England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam De Melun IIが1172年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンで生まれた時，父Louis De Melun Iは20歳，母Gisèle De Cambraiは16歳であった。Aremburge d'Halluinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年9月29日にイギリスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Melun II(이)가 1172년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis De Melun I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle De Cambrai(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Aremburge d'Halluin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 9월 29일 영국에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun II nasceu em 1172, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Louis De Melun I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle De Cambrai, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Aremburge d'Halluin. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1217, em Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam De Melun II родился в 1172 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis De Melun I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle De Cambrai, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Aremburge d'Halluin. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1217 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam De Melun II nació en 1172, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Louis De Melun I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Gisèle De Cambrai, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Aremburge d'Halluin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1217, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
